fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's position in the BOM structure. Lower-level items are indented under their parents.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's description.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant code that you entered in the Variant Filter field in the Item Availability by BOM Level window.

fields.name: Replenishment System
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's replenishment system.

fields.name: Bottleneck
fields.tooltip: Specifies which item in the BOM structure restricts you from making a larger quantity than what is shown in the Able to Make Top Item field.

fields.name: Lot Size
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's lot size. The value is copied from the Lot Size field on the item card.

fields.name: Low-Level Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's level in the BOM structure.

fields.name: Qty. per Parent
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the component are required to assemble or produce one unit of the parent.

fields.name: Qty. per Top Item
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the component are required to assemble or produce one unit of the top item.

fields.name: Able to Make Top Item
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the BOM item on the top line can be assembled or produced.

fields.name: Able to Make Parent
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the BOM item on the collapsible line above it can be assembled or produced.

fields.name: Available Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line are available, regardless of how many parents you can make with the item.

fields.name: Gross Requirement
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total demand for the item.

fields.name: Scheduled Receipts
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item are inbound on orders.

fields.name: Unused Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the part of the item's total availability that is not required to make the quantities that are shown in the fields.

fields.name: Lead Time Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long it takes to replenish the item, by purchase, assembly, or production.

fields.name: Lead-Time Offset
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total number of days that are required to assemble or produce the item.

fields.name: Rolled-up Lead-Time Offset
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cumulative lead time of components under a parent item.

fields.name: Needed by Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the item must be available to make the parent or top item.

fields.name: Safety Lead Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies any safety lead time that is defined for the item.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item's last purchase cost that includes indirect costs, such as freight that is associated with the purchase of the item.

fields.name: Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's overhead rate.

fields.name: Scrap %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item that you expect to be scrapped in the production process.

fields.name: Scrap Qty. per Parent
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item are scrapped to output the top item quantity.

fields.name: Scrap Qty. per Top Item
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item are scrapped to output the parent item quantity.

fields.name: Resource Usage Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the cost of the resource on the assembly BOM is allocated during assembly.

fields.name: Single-Level Material Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total material cost of all components on the parent item's BOM.

fields.name: Single-Level Capacity Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity costs related to the item's parent item only.

fields.name: Single-Level Subcontrd. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the single-level cost of outsourcing operations to a subcontractor.

fields.name: Single-Level Cap. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the single-level capacity overhead cost.

fields.name: Single-Level Mfg. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the single-level manufacturing overhead cost.

fields.name: Single-Level Scrap Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of material at this BOM level that will eventually be scrapped in order to produce the parent item.

fields.name: Rolled-up Material Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the material cost of all items at all levels of the parent item's BOM, added to the material cost of the item itself.

fields.name: Rolled-up Capacity Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity costs related to the item's parent item and other items in the parent item's BOM.

fields.name: Rolled-up Subcontracted Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the single-level cost of outsourcing operations to a subcontractor.

fields.name: Rolled-up Capacity Ovhd. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the rolled-up manufacturing overhead cost of the item.

fields.name: Rolled-up Mfg. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's overhead capacity cost rolled up from underlying item levels.

fields.name: Rolled-up Scrap Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of all component material that will eventually be scrapped to produce the parent item.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total non inventory material cost of all components on the parent item's BOM.

fields.name: Rolled-up Mat. Non-Invt. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the non inventory material cost of all items at all levels of the parent item's BOM, added to the non inventory material cost of the item itself.

fields.name: Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of all cost at this BOM level.

fields.name: BOM Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure of the BOM item.

fields.name: Qty. per BOM Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the component are required to assemble or produce one unit of the item on the BOM line.
